deploy.startCommand: echo '=== Starting deployment ===' && echo '=== Running Alembic migrations ===' && timeout 60 alembic -c alembic/alembic.ini upgrade head 2>&1 || { echo 'ERROR: Alembic migration failed or timed out (exit code '$?')'; exit 1; } && echo '=== Migrations complete, starting uvicorn ===' && exec uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port $PORT --log-level info
